title: glyceria maxima var. americana
intro: Glyceria maxima var. americana, also known as American zebra grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is native to North America and is often used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Glyceria maxima var. americana include its ability to support digestive health, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve sleep quality. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat digestive issues and promote relaxation.
